message:
feat: add secret redaction patterns for telemetry

- Add SECRET_PATTERNS array with 17 patterns for detecting secrets
- Patterns cover: API keys (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, AWS, Azure),
  tokens (GitHub, GitLab, NPM, PyPI, Slack), database URIs
  (Postgres, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis), private keys, JWTs
- Add compiled SECRET_REGEXES using LazyLock for efficiency
- Add redact_secrets() function for pattern-based secret detection
- Update redact_for_telemetry() to apply secret redaction before
  argument truncation in Pattern mode
- Add 16 comprehensive tests for secret redaction
- Fix clippy uninlined format args warnings

Closes git_safety_guard-eod3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
